articles.title: OpenAI helps Hyatt advance AI among colleagues
articles.description: Hyatt deploys ChatGPT Enterprise across its global workforce, using GPT-5.4 and Codex to improve productivity, operations, and guest experiences.

articles.title:
We're launching the Anthropic STEM Fellows Program. 

AI will accelerate progress in science and engineering. We're looking for experts across these fields to work alongside our research teams on spec
articles.description:
We're launching the Anthropic STEM Fellows Program. 

AI will accelerate progress in science and engineering. We're looking for experts across these fields to work alongside our research teams on specific projects over a few months.

Learn more and apply: https://t.co/MoF60j53pX

articles.title: We're expanding our collaboration with Amazon to secure up to 5 gigawatts of compute for training and deploying Claude. Capacity begins coming online this quarter, with nearly 1 gigawatt expected by t
articles.description: We're expanding our collaboration with Amazon to secure up to 5 gigawatts of compute for training and deploying Claude. Capacity begins coming online this quarter, with nearly 1 gigawatt expected by the end of 2026.

articles.title:
Amazon is also investing an additional $5 billion in Anthropic today, with up to $20 billion more in the future.

Read more: https://t.co/chesRLW7cV

Last week, we released a preview of memories in Codex.

Today, we’re expanding the experiment with Chronicle, which improves memories using recent screen context.

Now, Codex can help with what you’ve
articles.description:
Last week, we released a preview of memories in Codex.

Today, we’re expanding the experiment with Chronicle, which improves memories using recent screen context.

Now, Codex can help with what you’ve been working on without you restating context. https://t.co/b3p8I5eXOy

articles.title:
Chronicle runs background agents to build memories from screen captures. It uses rate limits quickly.

Screen captures are stored temporarily on device to generate memories—also stored on device. You
articles.description:
Chronicle runs background agents to build memories from screen captures. It uses rate limits quickly.

Screen captures are stored temporarily on device to generate memories—also stored on device. You can inspect and edit memories. Be aware that other apps may access these files.

🚀 Introducing Qwen3.6-Max-Preview, an early preview of our next flagship model

More Qwen3.6 models to come. Stay tuned!
